steps.title: Multiply each pair of terms
steps.content:
Distribute each term in the first factor across the second factor:
$$w(4w)=4w^2$$
$$w(-9)=-9w$$
$$6(4w)=24w$$
$$6(-9)=-54$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
The middle terms are the only like terms, so combine them:
$$-9w+24w=15w$$
Keep the first and last terms from the distribution:
$$4w^2+15w-54$$
The answer is C.
